summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sonel MPI-530 Interactive Guide app - both backend and frontend working perfectly
passed_tests: Backend: All 6 measurement functions API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Backend: Function details API returns complete data for all functions
Backend: Search API working for Polish and English queries
Backend: FAQ API returns structured data correctly
Frontend: Homepage loads with all 6 function cards in grid layout
Frontend: Function card click opens detailed step-by-step instructions
Frontend: Dark mode toggle switches themes correctly
Frontend: Back button returns from detail view to homepage
Frontend: Sidebar navigation opens and function selection works
Frontend: LCD display shows expected results in detail view
Frontend: Safety notes section displays properly with warning styling
Frontend: Step navigation (Previous/Next buttons) works correctly with proper disabled states
Frontend: Search functionality works and displays results
Frontend: Industrial design theme with Bento grid layout loads correctly
